svg.title: 32-bit MIPS Pipelined CPU datapath and control diagram
svg.desc: Five-stage pipeline: Fetch, Decode, Execute, Memory, Writeback with hazard unit, forwarding paths, and controller.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the PC register and next-PC mux logic in the MIPS CPU')
sendPrompt('Explain the register file and forwarding in the MIPS CPU')
sendPrompt('Explain the ALU and forwarding muxes in the MIPS CPU execute stage')
sendPrompt('Explain the data cache and memory stage in the MIPS CPU')
sendPrompt('Explain the writeback result mux including JAL support in the MIPS CPU')
sendPrompt('Explain the instruction memory in the MIPS CPU')
sendPrompt('Explain sign extension and branch equality check in decode stage')
sendPrompt('Explain the forwarding muxes (forwardaE, forwardbE) in the execute stage')
sendPrompt('Explain the next-PC selection logic: branch, jump, jr, and exceptions')
sendPrompt('Explain the controller (maindec + aludec) and which control signals it generates')
sendPrompt('Explain how the destination register is selected (rd vs rt vs $31 for JAL)')
sendPrompt('Explain the hazard unit: load-use stall, branch stall, forwarding, and exception flush')
g.text: Load-use stall · Branch stall · forwardaE/bE · forwardaD/bD · mem_stall · Exception flush

svg.text: Control signals propagate ID → EX → MEM → WB via pipeline registers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are memtoreg, memwrite, alusrc, regdst, regwrite control signals?')
sendPrompt('What are branch, jump, jal, jr control signals?')
sendPrompt('What does alucontrol encode in the MIPS CPU?')
sendPrompt('What does regwrite control and when is it suppressed?')

svg.text: Stall and flush signals from hazard unit

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When does stallF/stallD trigger and what does it do?')
sendPrompt('When does flushE trigger in the hazard unit?')
sendPrompt('When does stallE/M/W trigger (mem_stall)?')
sendPrompt('What happens on an exception (Exception_Flag / intr)?')
sendPrompt('What does flushD do on an exception?')
sendPrompt('Which R-type instructions are supported and what do they use from the datapath?')
g.text: add sub and or slt jr

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which I-type instructions are supported?')
sendPrompt('Which J-type instructions are supported and how does JAL write $ra?')
sendPrompt('What happens on an illegal opcode (default case in maindec)?')
